作者大大，为什么要完结啊？[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751187121,"group_id":"7475672274683579454","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2549116375145833"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7475672274683579454","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"169"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2041,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21069,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7489462919612171033","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个是超好看的，主角陈小奕穿越到狗熊岭，获得是一枚美食系统，连接平行世界，做美食每个人物吃，最开始给熊大熊二做，后面连接了喜羊羊与灰太狼，还有哪吒和果冻三剑客的世界为主角做美食。虽然现在内容不多，但真的好看啊，而且这本书也可以学到厨艺，很厉害的，即可娱乐又可以增加自己的做饭能力[送心][送心]推荐推荐[送心][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":16,"text":"狗熊岭","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8B%97%E7%86%8A%E5%B2%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741977589D7F54B9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227489462919612171033%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227475672274683579454%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8B%97%E7%86%8A%E5%B2%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":68,"s":61,"text":"喜羊羊与灰太狼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%96%9C%E7%BE%8A%E7%BE%8A%E4%B8%8E%E7%81%B0%E5%A4%AA%E7%8B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741977589D7F54B9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227489462919612171033%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227475672274683579454%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%96%9C%E7%BE%8A%E7%BE%8A%E4%B8%8E%E7%81%B0%E5%A4%AA%E7%8B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743783035,"group_id":"7475672274683579454","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1fPCcGmfzL3gdGybgxUxCPikxDk4ZZfx7gMPuowgrf9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2c944421589346ac9d34be7caa69f303~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795870&x-signature=cG66b%2FZYl4Wh%2BYh2PATHSLVlvU8%3D","user_id":"2549116375145833","user_name":"心灵6666"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2549116375145833","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7475672274683579454","book_info":{"abstract":"社畜陈小奕受不了疯狂被老板压榨的日子，辞职卖煎饼。
被大货车创了以后以后穿越到了狗熊岭。
醒来以后穿越到了狗熊岭，绑定了美食系统。
每天都有不同世界的顾客来到狗熊岭享用美食。
只要顾客来到店里享用美食，获得顾客好评就可以升级系统。
光头强：肥波喜欢吃香肠，多来点香肠。
肥波：喵喵喵！（第一次吃那么好吃的香肠）
熊二：光头强都赞美的餐厅，我倒要来看看有什么名堂。
熊大：这鱼做的也太好吃了吧，难怪光头强天天来。
灰太狼：我老婆想要喝羊肉汤，给我来一份烤全羊。
红太狼：最近减肥，来点素的吧。
小灰灰：爸爸！下次我还要来。
十冷哪吒：讨厌啦，人家才不是那种看到好吃的就走不动道的人。
十冷李靖：逆子，给为父留点啊
魔童哪吒：给小爷烤只鸡，不行的话小爷自己烤。
